title: rosa carolina var. obovata
intro: Rosa carolina var. obovata, also known as the Carolina rose, is a variety of wild rose native to the southeastern United States. The plant's flowers, leaves, and stems have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Rosa carolina var. obovata include treating digestive issues, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Rosa carolina var. obovata can be prepared as a tea, salve, or tincture, with the herbal preparations often used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
